notes: Normalizes route legs to the top-level canonical routeLegsByDay source and removes stale legacy loadInfo.routeLegsByDay on load/import/export.
Fixes day-boundary coverage and cross-midnight rest checks without creating fake driving events.
Treats Drop & Hook transition shipping documents as expected delivered/picked-up records, and supports Drop Off plus Hook Empty/Reposition intermodal moves without reusing the old load number.
Adds route-based miles recommendations, intermodal chassis form display, and safer Sign/DOT checks for stale location labels.
Does not change DRIVING event start times, end times, or duty status.
label: v95.74 Log route normalization + sign fix
